indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or objects for comfort
indicators.rationale: There are no objects or furniture to provide comfort or support for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or natural light
indicators.rationale: The lack of windows or natural light makes it difficult to establish a circadian rhythm.

indicators.name: no privacy or acoustic enclosure
indicators.rationale: The open layout and lack of walls make it impossible to achieve a private, quiet environment.

reasoning_summary: This space is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed or resting surface, no furniture or objects for comfort, no windows or natural light, and no privacy or acoustic enclosure. The open layout and lack of walls make it impossible to achieve a private, quiet environment.
